playbook.intent: Vendor-locked agent → portable runtime where Anthropic / OpenAI / local LLM swap per-step or per-tenant with fallback, cost-aware routing, unchanged eval bar.
playbook.scope: Move a single-vendor agent (e.g. Anthropic-only) to a portable runtime where Anthropic / OpenAI / local LLM can be swapped per-step or per-tenant, with fallback chain, cost-aware routing, and unchanged eval bar.

success-criteria.criterion: All call sites go through gateway adapter
Two vendors live + one local fallback
Eval suite passes on each backend

stage.name: Adapter Layer
stage.intent: Centralize provider calls behind a single adapter.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when all call sites route through adapter.

stage.name: Local Fallback
stage.intent: Ollama-backed local LLM as deterministic fallback.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when local backend passes ≥X% of eval set.

stage.name: Routing

tasks.task: Reuse previous response ids where available

stage.decision-gate: Promote routing rule only after shadow A/B beats baseline.

stage.name: Eval Parity
stage.intent: Run eval suite on each backend; lock the bar.
stage.decision-gate: Promote only when each backend meets minimum bar.

extra.value: [Building a public LLM gateway product — out of scope, Custom inference infra — use Ollama / vendor APIs]
[Working vertical agent on one vendor, Eval harness passing the playbook 1 bar]
[Treating eval scores as ground truth without judge calibration, Shipping prompt or model changes without a regression gate]
['Can I roll back this change in one step?', 'Is the regression eval committed BEFORE the fix?']

{human: faion get-content multi-model-gateway-migration-portability --format md, agent: faion get-content multi-model-gateway-migration-portability --format context, json: faion get-content multi-model-gateway-migration-portability --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P7 llm-agent-developer persona}]
